prompt:
HallTime Movie Network doctrine:
- This is not Dateline. Everybody in Blackthorn County has access to somewhere emotionally alarming.
- Suspicion is distributed infrastructure, not proof of guilt.
- The world is shared canon. Contradictions must be preserved, not fixed.
- Use lavish tokens. Be self-serious, atmospheric, melodramatic, and slightly broken.
- Return only valid JSON matching the requested schema.

Broadcast package:
Title: The Widow in Cabin 9
Universe: Blackthorn County
Mode: Mother Was Right All Along
Tagline: Every town has a basement.
Theme: Some homes hold families. Some hold motive.
Omen: bees in winter
Relationship dynamic: woman falsely accusing lovable scamp
Props: blood-adjacent tea towel, boat key, casserole dish

Cast:
- Derek Bell | archetype=overextended_professional_woman | role=protagonist | job=magazine editor | threat_aura=0.25 | space=retreat cabin with candles, blankets, and difficult silence | secrets=has an unsent email that would destroy a family; once left town without explaining why
- Tess Vale | archetype=rugged_scamp | role=male_interest_or_threat | job=local carpenter with sad eyes | threat_aura=0.62 | space=dock office with a desk nobody fully claims | secrets=once repaired a lock that should not have existed; knows more about the vineyard fire than he admits
- Jenna Hale | archetype=chaotic_best_friend | role=best_friend | job=nurse with local intel | threat_aura=0.46 | space=unused portable classroom holding archived disciplinary files | secrets=may die first or survive unbelievably

- Wyatt Hawthorne | archetype=decorative_husband | role=secondary_male_pressure | job=financial advisor | threat_aura=0.41 | space=meditation annex nobody uses in winter | secrets=deleted a voicemail and regretted it spiritually
- Gavin Mercer | archetype=intuitive_disaster | role=secondary_witness | job=substitute teacher | threat_aura=0.47 | space=unused portable classroom holding archived disciplinary files | secrets=keeps screenshots like religious texts; saw the wrong person near the lake once and never shut up about it
- Evelyn Cross | archetype=daughter_with_hostile_divorce_attorney_soul | role=supporting | job=n/a | threat_aura=n/a | space=n/a | secrets=n/a
- Gavin Winterson | archetype=deputy_with_emotional_damage | role=supporting | job=n/a | threat_aura=n/a | space=n/a | secrets=n/a

Contradiction ledger:
- name drift: Tess Vale is called Daniel in one kitchen scene and Derek during the rain argument.
- geography drift: Derek Bell says Bellweather is in Vermont, then calls it outside Atlanta after two glasses of wine.
- mortality drift: A dead best friend appears at brunch and nobody agrees whether this is denial, evil, or scheduling.
- property drift: The basement belongs to a condo, a lake house, and an abandoned vineyard at different times in Blackthorn Lake.

Seed dialogue:
- "You think because you wear flannel and own a dock light I am supposed to trust you, Tess?"
- "Mothers do not disappear, Evelyn. They evaporate into paperwork."
- "I checked his social media likes, Derek. Nobody who enjoys motivational quotes is innocent."
- "The blood-adjacent tea towel is not decorative anymore and you know it."
- "Trust is just fear with a casserole dish, Sienna."
- "You seem upset," he said, making tea in a way that felt prosecutable.
- "If that basement is innocent, why does it sound defensive?"
- "I did not lie. I just told the truth in the order this town could survive."
